defaultEvents.title: Plastic Bottle Decision
defaultEvents.question: You finish drinking water from a plastic bottle. What do you do?

choices.text: Throw it in the recycling bin
choices.consequence: The bottle gets processed and recycled into new products!
It ends up in a landfill and takes 450+ years to decompose.
Ocean animals may mistake it for food. Devastating!

choices.text: Reuse it as a water bottle
choices.consequence: Zero waste! You've reduced consumption and saved money.

defaultEvents.title: Energy at Home
defaultEvents.question: It's a hot day. How do you cool down your room?

choices.text: Turn on the AC at maximum
choices.consequence: Your carbon footprint skyrockets. High electricity bill incoming!

choices.text: Open windows and use a fan
choices.consequence: Natural ventilation saves energy and money!

choices.text: Close all blinds and stay in shade
choices.consequence: Good passive cooling, but limited effect.

choices.text: Turn on AC but keep it at 25°C
choices.consequence: Balanced comfort and energy efficiency.

defaultEvents.title: Water Usage
defaultEvents.question: How long should you shower to conserve water?

choices.consequence: You saved 25+ gallons of water! 💧
Average usage. Could do better!
You wasted 50+ gallons. The planet is thirsty!
Champion water saver! 🏆

defaultEvents.title: Transportation Choice
defaultEvents.question: You need to go to school. What's your best choice?

choices.consequence: Zero emissions + exercise! You're a climate hero! 🚴
Much better than cars! You reduced your carbon footprint.
Cars emit CO2. Consider carpooling next time.
High emissions! This is a major carbon producer.

defaultEvents.title: Forest Protection
defaultEvents.question: You discover a company cutting down a forest. What do you do?

choices.consequence: Great activism! You helped protect wildlife habitats.
Public awareness is powerful! You're making a difference!

choices.text: Ignore it, it's not your problem
choices.consequence: Forests are Earth's lungs. Inaction has consequences.
Digital activism counts! Every voice matters.

defaultEvents.title: Food Choices
defaultEvents.question: What should you choose for lunch to help the environment?

choices.consequence: Sustainable and healthy! No carbon emissions from shipping.

choices.text: Beef imported from across the world
choices.consequence: Beef has the highest carbon footprint. Plus shipping!
Excellent choice! 90% lower carbon than beef! 🌱
Better option than beef. Local is great!

defaultEvents.title: Plastic vs Paper
defaultEvents.question: You're buying groceries. Choose your bags:

choices.consequence: Best choice! Reusable items are the future! ♻️
Plastic ends up in oceans and harms wildlife.
Better than plastic, but trees were cut. Not ideal.

choices.text: Ask for no bags, carry items myself
choices.consequence: Perfect! Zero waste solution! 🎉

defaultEvents.title: Electronics Disposal
defaultEvents.question: Your old phone is broken. What happens to it?

choices.text: Take it to an e-waste recycling center
choices.consequence: Metals are recovered and reused. Responsible choice!
Toxic materials leak into soil. Massive pollution!

choices.text: Give it to a friend to refurbish
choices.consequence: Circular economy! More phones = less manufacturing!

choices.text: Leave it to rot in a drawer
choices.consequence: Missed opportunity to recycle. Eventually it becomes e-waste.

defaultEvents.title: Climate Activism
defaultEvents.question: A company pollutes a river. You have evidence. What do you do?

choices.consequence: Public pressure works! Awareness is the first step.
Official action! You triggered enforcement.
Awareness helps, but limited impact.

choices.text: Do nothing, you're just one person
choices.consequence: Silence = complicity. Every voice matters!

defaultEvents.title: Renewable Energy
defaultEvents.question: Your family wants to install solar panels. React:

choices.consequence: Renewable energy hero! This prevents tons of CO2/year.
Worth it long-term. Government subsidies exist!

choices.text: Push for other family discussions too
choices.consequence: You're a climate leader! Change starts at home! 🏡
Your future depends on energy choices now!
